# IBD Stock Quotes

GET STOCK QUOTE

Get a stock quote from Investor’s Business Daily. IBD stock quotes give you so much more than price. IBD quotes on Investors.com
provide many key criteria and data for a stock to help you with your stock research.
You get price and volume information, plus stock charts, group rankings, exclusive stock ratings, stock news and more.
Enter a ticker to get instant access to valuable information that will help you evaluate whether a stock you are researching is a winner.
We also give you the company’s fundamental data such as return on equity, PE Ratio, the dividend yield, and market capitalization. IBD’s ratings
will help you quickly identify market leaders that are displaying strong fundamental and technical characteristics.
Our powerful rating system also helps you compare your stocks to others in the market. To learn more about evaluating stocks,
be sure to check out the [How to Find & Evaluate](http://education.investors.com/courselandingpage.aspx?id=735774) section in
[IBD University](http://education.investors.com/).
